def predict(key, box) -> bool:
    # Hypothesis:
    # - Red box opens with the red key (no moon-shaped key exists).

    shape_to_key_id = {
        "cloud": "cloud",
        "diamond": "diamond",
        "heart": "heart",
        "triangle": "triangle",
    }

    # Red box special-case (color match)
    if box.id == "red":
        return key.id == "red"

    # Shape-based matches for the remaining boxes
    if box.shape in shape_to_key_id:
        return key.id == shape_to_key_id[box.shape]

    return False
